cmd.addBreakpointAt: Add Breakpoint at Address or Label…
view.launcher.welcome:
[$(add) New CPC Project...](command:z80debug.newProject)
[$(run) Launch CPC...](command:z80debug.quickLaunch)
[$(settings-gear) CPC Project Config...](command:z80debug.configureProject)
[$(tools) Configure](command:z80debug.configure)
dbg.label: Z80 Emulator
cfg.title: Z80 Debug
cfg.entryPoint.desc: Main ASM source file to assemble (relative to workspace root). Used by the build task.
cfg.buildName.desc: Base name for build outputs (e.g. "mygame" → build/mygame.dsk, build/mygame.rasm). Used by the build task and launch config.
cfg.sugarbox.desc: Path to the Sugarbox emulator binary (e.g. C:\\Tools\\Sugarbox.exe or /usr/local/bin/Sugarbox).
cfg.rasm.desc: Path to the RASM assembler binary (e.g. C:\\Tools\\rasm_w64.exe or rasm if on PATH).
cfg.hideEmulator.desc: Hide the emulator window when launching a debug session (can be overridden per launch config).
snippet.diskRasm.label: Amstrad CPC: Launch with disk (RASM)
snippet.diskRasm.desc: Start Sugarbox, insert a .dsk and break at entry point
snippet.snapshotBuild.label: Amstrad CPC: Build & launch snapshot (RASM)
snippet.snapshotBuild.desc: Assemble with RASM, load the generated .sna and symbols
snippet.snapshot.label: Amstrad CPC: Launch with snapshot
snippet.snapshot.desc: Start Sugarbox and load a .sna snapshot
snippet.attach.label: Amstrad CPC: Attach to running emulator
snippet.attach.desc: Attach to a Sugarbox already started with --debug_server 1234
snippet.plain.label: Amstrad CPC: Plain CPC (nothing loaded)
snippet.plain.desc: Start Sugarbox with a bare CPC — no disk, no tape, no snapshot
snippet.diskOneshot.label: Amstrad CPC: Debug a disk (one-shot)
snippet.diskOneshot.desc: Start Sugarbox with a .dsk in drive A — no build step
snippet.tapeOneshot.label: Amstrad CPC: Debug a tape (one-shot)
snippet.tapeOneshot.desc: Start Sugarbox with a .cdt/.wav tape — no build step
snippet.cartridge.label: Amstrad CPC: Debug a cartridge (CPC+)
snippet.cartridge.desc: Start Sugarbox (CPC+ mode) with a .cpr cartridge
attr.emulator.desc: Path to the Sugarbox emulator binary
attr.configuration.desc: Sugarbox machine configuration to load (e.g. CPC6128, CPC464, CPC+). Passed as --cfg to Sugarbox. Omit to use the default.
attr.disk.desc: Path to the .dsk disk image to insert in drive A
attr.diskB.desc: Path to the .dsk disk image to insert in drive B
attr.tape.desc: Path to the .cdt/.wav tape image to insert
attr.snapshot.desc: Path to the .sna snapshot to load
attr.cartridge.desc: Path to the .cpr cartridge image to insert (CPC+ / GX4000)
attr.port.desc: TCP debug server port (must match --debug_server value)
attr.symbolFile.desc: RASM super-symbol file (.rasm) for label display in disassembly
attr.sourceFile.desc: Main ASM source file (.asm) — used to enrich disassembly with comments
attr.hideEmulator.desc: Hide the emulator window (pass --hide to Sugarbox)
